children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Administrator, in coordination with the National Council on Disability and the National Advisory Council, shall establish a comprehensive system to assess, on an ongoing basis, the Nation’s prevention capabilities and overall preparedness, including operational readiness.

children.heading: Performance metrics and measures
children.label: b Performance metrics and measures
children.text: The Administrator shall ensure that each component of the national preparedness system, National Incident Management System, National Response Plan, and other related plans and strategies, and the reports required under is developed, revised, and updated with clear and quantifiable performance metrics, measures, and outcomes.section 752 of this title
compliance with the national preparedness system, National Incident Management System, National Response Plan, and other related plans and strategies;
capability levels at the time of assessment against target capability levels defined pursuant to the guidelines established under ;section 746(a) of this title
resource needs to meet the desired target capability levels defined pursuant to the guidelines established under ; andsection 746(a) of this title
performance of training, exercises, and operations.
